---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new template, preset, or example
title: "[Request] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What do you need?

Describe the template, preset, or example you'd like to see.

## Which stack or context?

(e.g. Next.js, Supabase, Firebase, generic, etc.)

## Why is it valuable?

Explain what problem this solves for developers or teams.

## Existing alternatives?

Are there any existing templates that partially cover this? What's missing?
